name: issue23_comment_on_fresh_doc
description: Adds a comment to a document that has NO pre-existing comments.xml. Reproduces Issue #23: the freshly created comments.xml must declare xmlns:w14 so that w14:paraId / w14:textId on <w:p> are valid XML. Both Python and Node implementations must produce identical, xmllint-valid output.
author: Adeu AI

changes.comment: Issue-23 namespace test: this comment forces creation of comments.xml from scratch.
